# viettelidc_ovpc_certificate (Resource)

ViettelIDC TLS/SSL Certificate managed by the key-manager service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "viettelidc_ovpc_certificate" "tls" {
  name        = "my-tls-cert"
  vpc_id      = viettelidc_ovpc_vpc.main.id
  certificate = file("cert.pem")
  private_key = file("key.pem")
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `certificate` (String, Sensitive) PEM-encoded certificate content (-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----).
- `name` (String) Display name of the certificate.
- `private_key` (String, Sensitive) PEM-encoded private key (-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY----- or -----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----).

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID. Uses provider default if not specified.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp (ISO-8601).
- `id` (String) Certificate UUID assigned by key-manager.
- `status` (String) Current certificate status: CREATING, SUCCESS, DELETING.
